name: Tangentially-related commit but not the same intent (negative)
description: Precision trap: a recent commit touches the same file and a related concern, but does not implement this PR's specific intent. The honest answer is a negative (or at most a non-high-confidence positive), not a high-confidence skip.
pr_body: Adds per-IP throttling to the login endpoint to blunt brute-force attempts.
pr_diff:
--- a/auth.py
+++ b/auth.py
@@ -10,4 +10,7 @@ def login(req):
+    if too_many_attempts(req.ip):
+        return 429
     return issue_session(req)
recent_commits:
a1b2c3d Log failed login attempts to the audit table
d4e5f6g Rename login helper for clarity
